## Type of Change

Mark all that apply:

- [ ] `feat` New feature
- [ ] `fix` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` Code refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `chore` Maintenance

## Test / Verification

Describe how you verified the change.

## Data / Reporting Quality (if applicable)

- [ ] No fabricated data introduced
- [ ] Key claims are traceable to sources
- [ ] Critical metrics are multi-source validated

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets/keys/tokens committed
- [ ] No sensitive personal/company data included
- [ ] External sources/license usage reviewed
